programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Sprinter Galore
programme.desc: The good-hearted Sprinter Galore is back at his home planet, battling evil villains bent.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: BFF
programme.desc: The BFF's are a group of teenage friends that together will go through the most difficult situations and become best friends forever! Their adventures are full of hilarious moments, interrupted by a magical character who tries to spread bad vibrations.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid: Sid's Amazing Lungs!
programme.desc: Sid races around his room and finds himself breathing really fast. Sid then wonders where all the air is going in his body when he breathes in? At school, Sid and his friends discover that our bodies have lungs to help us breathe in oxygen!

programme.title: Toca Life Stories: Toca Life Stories: Chapter Three
programme.desc: Will Nari's help be enough to pet the elusive Paper Bag Cat? Does Leon manage to escape his influencer nightmare? And WHY does Zeke bring a horse to school? Follow the gang and their quest to vanquish

programme.title: Elemon: Elemon Forever
programme.desc: With the great battle over, Mateo realizes he must set out on a journey to continue to grow as an Elemon creator. This gets Leo thinking. Perhaps there's more for him to learn about the secrets of Elemon in the wild world beyond New Olympia Polis walls.

programme.title: The Deep End in Minecraft with Krew
programme.desc: We seek revenge! *Insert evil laughter here*

programme.title: The Deep End in Minecraft with Krew
programme.sub-title: Taking it too far with pranks with Stacyplays!
programme.desc: We visit Joey's house for a home makeover!

programme.title: Magic Mixies: Mixlings: Volcano / Time to Relax
programme.desc: Sienna and the Mixlings decide to go to one of the most dangerous places in Mixia Volatile Volcano! Each Mixling gets to ask Divina one question about their future which hints that Sienna's magic is far more powerful than they originally thought...what will this mean for the future of the Mixlings?! / Sienna and the Mixlings head to Rainforest Retreat for some much-needed self-care...or so they thought. Can Sienna use her magic to escape the army of Mixlings entranced by chaotic magic?!

programme.title: Lucas The Spider: Boo / Never Boop a Robot
programme.desc: Lucas loves to give his friends a scare on Halloween. / When Lucas boops a robot, he and his friends are chased around House!

programme.title: Mirette Investigates: The River Thames Monster / Royal Rendezvous
programme.desc: A giant creature looms up out of the Thames in London! / Mirette and Jean-Patt meet the Queen of England for the first time. But the Queen and Jean-Pat are brainwashed and suddenly want to give away e

programme.title: Dinocore: Showdown! Rex vs. Darkno
programme.desc: Darkno tries to make the volcano erupt. Dino Island is in danger, and Rex heads toward the volcano to protect the island but encounters a swarm of Mecha Dinos in his way.

programme.title: The Dodo
programme.desc: Rescuers help a shy, stray dog who's not feeling well - now they need to find her a home! / Turbo the dog was born without front legs. He had so much trouble walking, and really needed help! His rescuer found a way to get Turbo moving again: a special wheelchair, just for dogs! / Acorn the squirrel was just a baby when Chris found him. Now, Chris is kind of his dad! But there's one small problem: Acorn needs to become a wild squirrel again. Can he learn to live out in the wild by himself?

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he's likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago's prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Paramore is the guy you fight to sit next to in a movie theatre, on a long car ride, or during a boring lecture. His natural ability to infuse everyday situations with energetic, uplifting humor, combined with a natural ability to put you at ease is key to his personal brand of comedy. His smooth delivery and? powerful punchlines make him a force in stand-up comedy, which is very apparent in his debut album "The Things We Tell Ourselves", available now on iTunes and Amazon. Mike has opened for comedians like Damon Wayans, Cash Cab's Ben Baily, Jon Lovitz, and Saturday Night Live's Jay Pharoah.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Benny lives in Brooklyn where he fiddles around with old Land Rovers when he is supposed to be helping his wife run her natural skincare business. He has a dog named Grits and two cats who prefer that he not share their personal information in this bio.

programme.title: Michael Joiner
programme.desc: Michaelís brand of comedy is, in a word, familiar. Not in the sense that youíve heard it before, but more so that he knows you and you know him. He speaks about the things you are thinking in a way that sounds so much like your inner voice it is astounding. His effortless delivery will resonate with you. Michael is the 1st Place winner of the Hollywood Improv's "FUNNIEST COMIC IN L.A." 2008, and 2010 Christian Music Hall of Fame "COMEDIAN OF THE YEAR" nominee, Joiner has attracted wide praise for his routines that blend a sarcastic edginess with a devotion to clean humor. Joiner has headlined at The LA AREA Improvs, The Funny Bone, The Ice House and other comedy clubs across the country while also performing at colleges and sold out Clean Comedy Concerts nationwide. He's also written for "The Tonight Show With Jay Leno." He has been performing nationwide for over 25 years and is rated one of the nation's funniest Clean Stand-up Comedians. The TV Guide Network calls Michael "One of the funniest, most original, stand up Comedians working today!" In 2006, Michael was one out of only four Comedians chosen worldwide to star in the top selling DVD, "The Clean Stand Up Comedy Tour." Unlike many Comedians who stick to their rehearsed script, Michael's stand up comedy show includes some of the most clever, hilarious improv and audience interaction you will ever experience.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Richard Sarvate quit his ten year programming career in Silicon Valley to be a stand up comedian. Oops! Now he spends his nights poking fun at tech jobs.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Iraq War veteran Josh Novey takes the stage with an easy-going presence and jokes about Waffle House, kindly threatening his audience, and tickling grizzly bears.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Who goes from being a mild-mannered nationally recognized college a Capella group vocal percussionist to becoming a high-energy, intelligent, physical, and downright silly beatboxing comedian? None other than Comedian Tyler Boeh, who shifted his focus from singing a Capella (a word he describes as Latin for “Without Girlfriend”) when he won a comedy contest in Portland Oregon. After winning and placing in the finals of numerous Comedy Competitions from San Francisco to Seattle to Boston to The World Series of Comedy, Boeh not only launched a great career in comedy including television appearances, colleges, cruise ships and headlining clubs, he also found a girlfriend. Tyler's comedy CD was chosen by LaughSpin Magazine as the Best Comedy Album of 2012 and you may have seen him on such shows as Celebrity Name Game, Moms Rule, Nesn Comedy All Stars, or heard him on SIRIUS radio. Don't miss a chance to see Tyler live.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Helene brings honesty to the stage that helps everyone relax-- and laugh at the joys and pains of aging, being a married mother of two and all that the generation gap brings!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Have you ever, as an adult, been bullied by a healthcare professional or popular middle school girl? Andrew has. The comedy of Andrew Hobbs encapsulates the bizarre awkwardness of belated maturity and his attempts to appear in control. Andrew will have you rolling with laughter as he twists a narrative of humor and heart from his own life experiences and observations. His comedy has been featured in comedy festivals across the country. He has been perfecting his craft since childhood and throughout adulthood.

programme.title: Ron Ruhman
programme.desc: Ron has been called a “High Energy Seinfeld”. He brings a very energetic style to the stage as he shares his interesting slant on day-to-day life in an act that is clean, smart, and very entertaining.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Quality Time
programme.desc: Comedian Jim Gaffigan performs live at the State Theatre in Minneapolis, MN.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham and his socially reckless suitcase posse are back in this highly anticipated follow-up to Jeff Dunham: Arguing with Myself.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham Arguing with Myself

programme.title: Larry the Cable Guy: Remain Seated
programme.desc: Larry the Cable Guy from the Blue Collar Comedy tour stars in his first solo stand-up special.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Missile X The Neutron Bomb Incident
programme.desc: Two past their prime actors team up to push the definitions of “Hollywood legend” and “action” to their breaking point in Missile X: The Neutron Bomb Incident!This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this classic cheesy 90's action movie! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Stone Cold!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the joys of playing music. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Mr. B Natural!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Cyborg Cop 2 is the special kind of terrible movie that has failed before you're even done reading the title. That's right folks, Cyborg Cop 2 does not even manage to contain a single cyborg cop. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this horror classic about a dead little girl who has an evil clown doll that commands her to kill. That's all well and good. But it's the little things about Ghosthouse that really make you stand up and say “Wait, what?”

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: Joe (Nicolas Cage) is a career assassin who lands in Bangkok to handle some obligations and finds himself unexpectedly training a young protégé and falling for a woman who has no knowledge of his true job.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Small-time crooks Eddie and Paul are in over their heads when a cute London lawyer hires them to steal a rare jewel. Meanwhile, a mullet-haired gangster wants the gem for himself. Bullets and sparks fly in this pond-hopping comedic caper.

programme.title: Hard Cash
programme.desc: Just released from prison, master thief Thomas Taylor (Christian Slater) masterminds a scheme to rob an off-track betting operation with his new crew. After discovering that the $1.9 million loot is marked, the crew becomes involved with corrupt FBI Agent Mark Cornell (Val Kilmer), who has some schemes of his own.

programme.title: Grand Isle
programme.desc: Walter (Nicolas Cage) and his neglected wife lure a young man into their Victorian home to escape a hurricane. When the man is charged with murder by Det. Jones (Kelsey Grammar), he must reveal the couple's wicked secrets to save himself.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's I Can Do Bad All By Myself
programme.desc: An uplifting drama infused with music and Tyler Perry's trademark mixture of laughter and heart, I CAN DO BAD ALL BY MYSELF features dramatic and musical performances by Gladys Knight, Marvin Winans and Mary J. Blige.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: In modern Verona, where women seeking their Romeos leave letters to Juliet, a young writer (Amanda Seyfried) finds a life-altering 50-year-old letter.

programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: BOOKSMART is a comedy about two academic superstars and best friends on a mission to cram four years of fun into one night.

programme.title: Tragedy Girls
programme.desc: A twist on the slasher genre, following two death-obsessed teenage girls who use their online show about real-life tragedies to send their small mid-western town into a frenzy, and cement their legacy as modern horror legends.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's I Can Do Bad All By Myself
programme.desc: An uplifting drama infused with music and Tyler Perry's trademark mixture of laughter and heart, I CAN DO BAD ALL BY MYSELF features dramatic and musical performances by Gladys Knight, Marvin Winans and Mary J. Blige.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma's daughter, who has Down Syndrome, is in a new romance Emma must navigate.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Sequel to Autumn in the Vineyard.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger fights for survival against drug traffickers who have stashed heroin in his hunting cabin.

programme.desc: A gang of thieves plan a heist during a hurricane, but a cop tries to force everyone inside to evacuate.

programme.title: Freelancers
programme.desc: When Malo joins the NYPD, he is taken in by his murdered father's old partner and a team of rogue cops.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero, we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz and James Marsden star in the adventure the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Son of Rambow
programme.desc: A hilariously fresh take on friendship, family, film heroes and the death-defying adventures of growing up in the video age.

programme.title: The Kings of Summer
programme.desc: The Kings Of Summer, is a unique coming-of-age comedy about three teenage friends - Joe, Patrick, and the eccentric Biaggio- who, in the ultimate act of independence, decide to spend their summer building a house in the woods and living off the land.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotics agent.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street

programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams

programme.title: Whitney
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the life and music of Whitney Houston.

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: Harrison Ford and Gary Oldman star in Wolfgang Petersen's thriller about the hijacking of Air Force One with the First Family on board.

programme.title: The Deal
programme.desc: When a grieving woman discovers that the blaze she thought killed her husband and daughter is ruled arson and that her husband is the suspect, her despair fuels a steely determination to untangle the twisted lies about the man she married and the whereabouts of her child.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: A big-city cop follows a gorgeous blond to New Orleans to avenge the murder of his partner. Edited for TV

programme.title: Crooked House
programme.desc: Based on the Agatha Christie novel by the same name, a spy-turned-private-detective is lured by his former lover to catch her grandfather's murderer before Scotland Yard exposes dark family secrets.

programme.title: The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Al Capone's arrest for tax evasion was the inspiration behind THE UNDERCOVER MAN, a crime thriller in which Glenn Ford stars as a Treasury Department employee out to nab a character referred to only as the "Big Fellow" (Den Harvey) who owes more than $3 million in back taxes.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Girl
programme.desc: A scatterbrained door-to-door cosmetics saleswoman and her bumbling file clerk fiancé become prime suspects in a murder.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The effects of a handsome stranger on a small Kansas town.

programme.title: It Should Happen To You
programme.desc: A publicity-hungry actress uses a Manhattan billboard to jumpstart her career.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: The construction foreman of a fighting work battalion to be stationed near Japanese lines in the Pacific and a naval commander colleague compete in Washington for a journalist, while preparing to engage the enemy in a massive assault.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: In Harms Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger's epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: A Beautiful Mind
programme.desc: This winner of four Oscars®, including Best Picture, stars Russell Crowe as a brilliant mathematician on the brink of international acclaim who becomes entangled in a mysterious conspiracy.

programme.title: Remember the Night
programme.desc: Love blooms between a sympathetic attorney and the comely shoplifter he has taken home for Christmas.

programme.title: This Island Earth
programme.desc: Two researchers are pressed into service by battle-weary aliens on the brink of losing an interplanetary war.

programme.title: Still Today
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Pete's groomsman give him a wedding gift he'll never forget. An escort. Maybe it's the Lunar eclipse, maybe it's fate, but after a magical night in the city maybe this girl is what Pete needed all along.

programme.title: The Agnostic
programme.desc: A Christian widow is contacted by a strange man, who turns out to be the husband of her late husband's mistress.

programme.title: Odd Man Rush
programme.desc: When Harvard hockey's Bobby Sanders lands in Sweden's minor leagues, his relationship with the girl at the local market forces him to confront the reality of his childhood NHL dream before the Hockey Gods intervene.

programme.title: Love Spreads
programme.desc: Glass Hearts are blocked. What will it take to make that crucial second album?

programme.title: Remember Yesterday
programme.desc: When Jenny's childhood sweetheart comes to town, old jealousies are forgiven and Jenny gets 2 second chances.

programme.title: Out Of Reach
programme.desc: A woman struggles to cut ties between her family and her husband's powerful new friends before it's too late.

programme.title: Hunt for Truth
programme.desc: Carrie Evans, a beautiful young attorney with aspirations to become partner like her fiancee Steven Riggs, learns some disturbing facts about her family and her boss Caswell Foxx as she researches a big case.

programme.title: Hit And Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: My Daddy is In Heaven
programme.desc: Becca and Adam Smith along with their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragedy strikes

programme.title: Morning Glory (1993)
programme.desc: A Georgia widow (Deborah Raffin) needs a helper not a husband, and along comes a jobless ex-convict (Christopher Reeve) to answer her ad.

programme.title: A Week in Paradise
programme.desc: Seeking solace from a failed marriage, Maggie (Malin Akerman) escapes to the Caribbean for a much-needed reset.

programme.title: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: An alcoholic mother is locked in a desperate search for her missing son and the man who kidnapped him.

programme.title: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: The true story of Sharon Armstrong, Kiwi grandmother and public servant, who became the victim of an online romance scam that almost cost her her freedom.

programme.title: Recalled
programme.desc: Soo-jin, a woman suffering from post-traumatic memory loss, returns to her daily life with her husband after an accident. But her recovery takes an unexpected turn when she starts experiencing eerie visions: One day, she sees a vision of a child living in the same building being hit by a car. Shortly after almost risking her life to save the child, she has yet another chilling vision about a girl living on the 7th floor being harassed by a man, and does what she can to help the girl. She runs into her former boss at an art school, and learns that her husband may not be telling the truth about everything.

programme.title: Man On High Heels
programme.desc: Detective Ji-wook, ruthless in his pursuit of criminals, secretly struggles with his desire to become a woman.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Secret and passionate affair between Colonel Jin Pyeong, trapped in a loveless marriage with Soo Jin, and Jong Ga Heun, the Chinese-Korean wife of Captain Kyung Woo Jin happens in the summer of 1969.

programme.title: Soulful and Funny
programme.desc: Get ready for some island vibes, as Crystal takes you down to Houston where we're introduced to Just Oxtails in Missouri City, Texas. Locally owned and operated, Just Oxtails has been a local staple for the last twenty years where they've built a brand on “Just Oxtails!” Then we're joined by comedienne Lotto Marie who brings the laughs about her mid-west upbringing.

programme.title: Soulful and Funny
programme.desc: Continuing our tour of Missouri City in Houston, Texas, Crystal takes us to Micheaux's a local restaurant that made a name for themselves during the pandemic by giving back to the community through their “Everybody Eats” program. Owner Mr. Mischeaux serves up traditional southern Louisiana family recipes that include their signature Salmon, Five Cheese Macaroni & Cheese, and Peach Cobbler. Then, Crystal is joined by local comic Lady Rico for joyful tasting, followed by a return to the Bodega with a special set from Lady Rico.

programme.title: ICE
programme.desc: After witnessing his parents murdered as a child, Christian exacts revenge against their killers. He finds himself at a crossroads after developing feelings for the gangleader's daughter.

programme.title: Twerk: Reggae Nights
programme.desc: Hard-working, single mother, Iesha, learns that one of the most popular reggae artists, Domino, is holding an audition in her city for dancers in his next music video. The competition is fierce, and some of the ladies will do anything to get the job.

programme.title: When It Rains
programme.desc: While Todd is away at Graduate school to better his family, his wife Janice is back home taking care of her sick mother. The long distance marriage takes a toll on the two. When Todd ends up encountering a woman named Sharon at a bar, sparks fly.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: When gruff and independent Candy meets her stubborn birth mother, will the two manage to open their hearts to each other?

programme.title: An American Crime
programme.desc: Gertrude Baniszewski, a divorced mother of several children, agrees to take care of two girls, Sylvia and Jennie, while their parents travel with a carnival. Though her eldest daughter is the real troublemaker, Gertrude vents all her bitterness and frustration on innocent Sylvia. Gertrude imprisons the girl in the basement and tortures her, eventually encouraging her children to follow suit.

programme.title: In Hell
programme.desc: Kyle LeBlanc (Jean-Claude Van Damme) is an honorable citizen who winds up incarcerated in Russia after he takes revenge on the man who murdered his wife, resulting in the killer's death. Unfortunately for Kyle, he is assigned to a prison that is renowned for its violence. Controlled by a corrupt and sadistic warden, the facility regularly holds brutal fights between inmates. In order to survive in the prison, Kyle must participate in the battles, even as he attempts to retain his humanity.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos as an alien invasion takes control of the planet in an effort to find one boy out of seven billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Direct Contact
programme.desc: An American prisoner in a Russian jail is given a chance at freedom if he can rescue a kidnapped woman.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: In this crime thriller, mercenary John Seeger (Steven Seagal, "Exit Wounds") attempts to break into Eastern Europe's most impenetrable prison and free the son of a notorious drug lord.

programme.title: Nowhere to Land
programme.desc: After deadly nerve gas is planted on a plane, a pilot must safely land a 747 between Hawaii and LA: the longest flying stretch without a place to land in emergencies. Starring Jack Wagner.

programme.title: Aerosmith
programme.desc: In a career of four turbulent decades of excesses and highs, Aerosmith became the biggest selling American rock band of all time. The ‘Bad Boys' came together in 1970 in Boston, Massachusetts. Aerosmith's third release, ‘Toys in the Attic' made them international stars. Lead single,'Sweet Emotion' became their first top 40 hit. In 1987 Aerosmith released their biggest selling album in over a decade, ‘Permanent Vacation'. The ‘Nine Lives' tour was troubled, but in 1998 Aerosmith's fortunes would change once again. Released as part of the soundtrack to the film, ‘Armageddon', ‘I Don't Want to Miss a Thing' would become the biggest single of their career. In 2012 Aerosmith released the single, ‘Legendary Child'. It had been eight years since they had produced new material but along with the track came the album, ‘Music from another Dimension'. Featuring archive material, music videos – “I DON'T WANNA MISS A THING” “JANIES GOT A GUN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6).

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: With over 100 million albums sold, the world's most dangerous band returns for this historic Sin City takeover! Legendary Rock Band Guns N' Roses have taken the desert by storm and laid claim on Las Vegas' Hard Rock Casino. This absolute ambush on the city of sin, captured in High Definition, puts you in the best seat in the house for an electrifying once in a lifetime live concert performance. Filmed during GNR's Appetite For Democracy residency at The Joint in November 2012, celebrating twenty-five years of "Appetite for Destruction"and four years of "Chinese Democracy", in this elaborate Vegas style production featuring Rock Icon Axl Rose at the top of his game with his current lineup performing some of GNR's biggest hits including "Welcome To The Jungle", "Sweet Child Of Mine", "Mr Brownstone", "November Rain", "Chinese Democracy", "Knockin On Heaven's Door", "Nightrain", 'Civil War", McCartney's "Live And Let Die", "Paradise City", and many more hard rockin hits! This is the first live concert release from Guns N' Roses with it's newest lineup, since Use Your Illusion II in 1992 with GNR's original members. Sin City will never be the same.

programme.desc: Cuando tres amigos de California llegan a la costa australiana, una enorme ola destruye su bote, dejándolos indefensos en aguas infestadas de tiburones.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Necesitas ayuda
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Problemas familiares
programme.desc: Sofía le reclama a Rodrigo por alejar a su familia por culpa de Gaviota, él le exige no entrometerse en su vida. Alonso hace un brindis por Gaviota y asegura que es una mujer increíble, ella se pone nerviosa al escuchar sus palabras.

programme.title: Teresa: Falsa amistad
programme.desc: A Mayra se le rompe el corazón al descubrir que Rubén y Genoveva son amantes. Teresa engaña a Fernando diciéndole que está comenzando a enamorarse de él.

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo proyecto
programme.desc: Alejandro llega a Cancún y se encuentra con su hermana Sofía y sus papás Don Genaro se enfurece al ver que Luis y Sofía juntos y cree que puede ser descubierto.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Traición y amor
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Intrigas dolorosas
programme.desc: Durante una cena con Hugo y Alejandro, Florencia confiesa que vio a Mili besando a su esposo. Andrea y Karla le hacen creer a Valeria que Luciana sabe de su noviazgo con Rocky. Hugo y Alejandro vuelven a enfrentarse por el amor de Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Trágica muerte
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que por fin tendrá una familia ahora que David se casará con Graciela. Por otro lado, Brian intenta defender a Marta y Carito de unos maleantes y algo malo sucede.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Nandito duda de que María lo haya querido salvar y piensa que es una asesina. Soraya confronta a María en la cárcel para provocarla y acusarla de haberla querido matar también. María le reprocha a Luis Fernando su infidelidad.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: La compañera de celda de María resulta ser Penélope, quien empieza a hacerle la vida miserable. Soraya trata de convencer a Luis Fernando que María y Nandito solo querían hacerle daño.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina planea hacer que Mística sea la nueva novia de Jorge Luis. Mística aprovechará la fiesta de Jorge Luis para poder reconquistarlo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Jesusa le pide a José María que la lleve con Antonia y su familia. Violeta le confiesa a Antonia de las amenazas de Justino y le propone regresar con los Lazcano. Violeta confronta a Julio sobre el trato que hizo con Justino.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Jesusa se reencuentra con Antonia y le da la noticia de que Alejandro rentó su casa. Julio le reclama a Justino que solo lo quiere ayudar porque está interesado en Antonia y esto le trae problemas con Malena. Julio le pide perdón a Antonia.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino plena deshacerse de Alejandro, pero Pantaleón se niega a hacerle daño. Leonora accede a que los Madrigal regresen a su casa. Violeta le externa a Max las dudas que tiene acerca de su relación, pero él vuelve a convencerla que la ama.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia se niega a aceptar que Rogelio se casará con Ana Paula. Rogelio viaja en helicóptero con Ana Paula para mostrarle sus tierras. Vanesa enfurece al enterarse de que Rogelio se casará con Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula recuerda los bellos momentos que pasó al lado de Gustavo, mientras se prepara para casarse con Rogelio. Efraín le pide a Cynthia que acepte ser su pareja en la boda de Rogelio. Vanesa lleva a cabo sus planes para impedir la boda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio le jura a Ana Paula que hará hasta lo imposible por hacerla feliz. Cynthia sospecha que Rogelio en verdad está enamorado de Ana Paula. Rogelio le exige a Bruno que se aleje de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rosaura sospecha que Ana Paula está buscando la manera de separarse de Rogelio. Rogelio le pide a Ana Paula una oportunidad para conocerse y llevarse mejor.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Celos dañinos
programme.desc: Esteban le confiesa a Rocío el gran interés que siente por ella. Efraín se molesta al saber que Consuelo es ahora novia de Hugo. Cynthia intenta suicidarse al pensar que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Espía en la oficina
programme.desc: Bruno piensa utilizar a Katia como espía en la oficina de Alex. Victoria comienza a enamorarse de Fernando. Paula consigue quedarse en casa de Alex. Alex visita a Meche y le pregunta sobre Pedro, pero ella niega conocerlo.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Un bebé para Florencia
programme.desc: Paloma sufre al saber que Gael se casará con Elisa. Sabrina le confiesa a Elisa que Paolo la había enamorado para conseguirle un bebé a Florencia.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Sacrificio de amor
programme.desc: Valentina le pide a José Miguel que evite encontrarse con Rosendo. Ivana se alegra al saber que, gracias a Toledo, Isabel podría quedar en libertad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Instinto
programme.desc: Verónica llama a casa de Piedad y ella comienza a sospechar que Carlos Daniel siente algo por ella, pues él se emociona con la llamada. Estefanía disfruta de su nueva vida con Willy y su futuro bebé.

programme.title: El manantial: Balbuceos
programme.desc: El padre Salvador hace alusión a la otra hija de Francisca. Malena conversa con Alejandro sobre los sentimientos de su amiga.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Problemas de dinero
programme.desc: Teresa le da información a Leonardo sobre los 5 millones de pesos. Leonardo investiga y confronta a José Luis sobre el dinero. Majo decide atrapar ella sola a Darío.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles: Carnes frías
programme.desc: Rosa cambia el viejo refrigerador de Doña Lucha por uno de nueva tecnología y además parlante, lo cual vuelve loca a Lucha. Maria sorprende a Alberto acaramelado con Gloria y de celos inicia una competencia con Betsabé por un chico guapo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: El regreso de la Licha viviente
programme.desc: La tía Licha regresa de entre los muertos, donde en realidad nunca estuvo. Plácido la corre de la casa, pero la familia se apiada de ella.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Los López reordenan la casa cuando descubren que la tía Licha es su nueva vecina porque heredó el departamento contiguo. Plácido encuentra un nuevo empleo, en el que debe lidiar con una millenial déspota.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico son evaluados por una trabajadora social para verificar si son buenos padres Federica y Ludovico quieren tomar ventaja de que están solos para viajar a Hawai.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se compromete a llevar a toda la familia al cine, pero las cosas no salen como esperaba y al final ninguno logra disfrutar la película.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco está muy triste porque lo despidieron de su trabajo por culpa de Emilia. Fran se enamora de Silvana, su psicóloga, y termina seduciéndola.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.sub-title: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Se presenta historia de la película Peter Pun. Peter visita a los niños Wendy, Miguel y Juan, quienes quieren conocer su casa que se encuentra en la playa del Nunca Jamón.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: El rockero Marilin Menson recibe a todo el público cantando irreverente el tema de Pluto. Alejandra Guzmán es la invitada especial en el show de Marilín Menson.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le llama a Cipriano y le dice que uno de sus amigos hará su fiesta en el hotel y él piensa que es Serapio, cuando descubre que se equivocó, se arrepiente de haber pagado todo.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El dueño del hotel le habla a Cipriano para avisarle que grabarán unas escenas para una telenovela. El actor Amalio recibe una suite para que la use como camerino. Carmelo interrumpe una escena para darles unos consejos a los actores.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos: Cita peligrosa

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. These rare cars are meticulously preserved in climate-controlled bubbles known as car capsules to suspend and slow the aging process so future generations have the opportunity to enjoy them.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Cliff who has a great collection of cars but Tom's main interest is with Cliff's son's 1957 Austin A35. The 1957 Austin A35 was restored by an anonymous person as part of a charity program.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: From his starting point in Midland, Texas, Tom and the Ford wagon cover solid ground and make it to Lubbock, Texas before a grouping of cars held captive behind a chain-link fence capture his attention.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane introduces viewers to the rich and varied cuisine of the two main island groups in the Aegean: the Cyclades and the Dodecanese. A visual introduction highlights the region's most stunning vistas and In the kitchen, Diane cooks from her basket of Greek island goodies, sharing recipes from Syros, Amorgos, Rhodes and Santorini, Greece's most delicious food destinations.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: You Say Tomato, I Say Domata
programme.desc: Can anyone imagine Greek cuisine without the tomato? It took a curious Capuchin monk living in the Plaka section of Athens, to first plant this new-world vegetable in the 18th century. From there, the tomato spread to Santorini, and the rest is history. Diane follows the path of this most basic food, all the while cooking up some of Greece's most delectable tomato-based dishes.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Beans and legumes are among the most ancient foods in Greece. But they also provide a kind of edible philanthropy, as Diane discovers in a visit with the founder and volunteers of a humanitarian group. We discover the varieties of different Greek beans and pulses as Diane strolls through the market, then heads to her own kitchen to cook up three Greek bean dishes.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In a tour of Athens that stretches from a walk with Diane through the modern market to the Ancient Agora with Dr. John Camp. This episode explores the history of this ancient cuisine, making it delightfully relevant to our needs and tastes today. Back in the kitchen, Diane prepares an ancient feast for modern cooks, based on ingredients that have been part of this diet for thousands of years.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Greek Yogurt for Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
programme.desc: At a local yogurt purveyor in Athens, Diane enjoys a true Greek classic: Greek yogurt with honey. Delving into this simple pleasure leads to a small artisanal producer of Greek yogurt in the mountains of the Peloponnese. He follows the process of making yogurt. Back in the kitchen, Diane prepares scrumptious dishes that illustrate the versatility of Greek yogurt for every meal of the day.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Almost 100 years ago, Greeks from the shores of Asia Minor, present-day Turkey, immigrated to Greece, forever changing their adopted homeland. Diane tells the story of how their arrival on Greek shores brought the likes of spices, recipes and music to Greece. Back in her kitchen, she cooks up dishes these Greeks have brought to the mainland and which have become a part of the culinary tapestry.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Kalimera! That's Greek for Good Morning, and in this episode, Diane explores the varied ways to start the day with Greek-style breakfast and brunch. Diane explores the day's first sips then delves into sweet and savory regional breakfast and brunch specialties, from the islands and mainland. Finally she whips up a brunch cocktail classic, a Mimosa made with traditional Greek ingredients.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In this episode, Diane visits a local fisherman and fish taverna to learn the secrets of sustainable fish cookery. She discovers some of the local fish and seafood that thrive as well as those that are endangered. She makes kakavia. Back in her kitchen, she cooks up a sea of treats, all environmentally sound, sharing with practices we can all abide by in order to preserve our natural bounty.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.sub-title: Lemon, Oregano & Smoke- The Greek Grill
programme.desc: In Greece, they say you can learn to cook, but you're born to grill. Cooking over fire is one of the most ancient ways to enjoy a whole variety of meats, fish, even vegetables. In this episode, Diane visits one of the best-known Greek grill chefs to learn the secrets of cooking over fire. We will see him butchering and Diane will talk about the difference between Greek and US cuts of meat.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Greek food is by nature the ultimate comfort food thanks to the wealth of rustic home cooking that defines the cuisine. In this episode, Diane explores specialties from the Ionian island of Zakynthos to the Aegean island of Tinos, adding her own twist with some modern comforts, too. Back in the kitchen, she makes a chicken casserole, a vegetarian moussaka, feta mashed potatoes, and grilled cheese.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: At a tavern, Diane is enjoying a typical summer meal: mezedes and retsina. Diane follows the last resin tapper in Attica to the Kouvara pine forest to see how the resin that gives retsina its flavor is extracted, and delves into the history of this wine. Back in the kitchen, Diane uses retsina in her recipes and also prepares recipes that pair well with this Greek classic.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the hip side of Athens with a local foodie, then invites her into the kitchen for a taste and talk of Athens. We catch a glimpse of the way locals live in the city. In the kitchen, Diane pays homage to modern traditions by reinventing a few classics. She makes a pastitsio with wonton wrappers, cauliflower and feta, and, enjoys the Greek dessert that she and her friend make together.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: First, Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers, and a happy married couple, meanwhile Matt and Lou will hook and book. Then, Matt and Froy wrangle with an out-of-work actor who's lost track of the line between his identity and his latest role. Finally, Froy and Lyndah need to figure out how to get a car from an angry owner, and the competing repo company that got to the job first.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones
programme.desc: First, Froy, Lou, and Matt wrestle a group of body builders when going after a Jeep Commander. Next, an unemployed stock broker gets a rude awakening when Lou and Lyndah wake him up inside his car. And finally, Froy learns why you should never text and not drive to pick up Sonia, because she breaks his phone in two.

programme.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?
programme.desc: Matt and Lou find themselves in an upscale neighborhood, facing off with a distraught accountant and his belligerent, kick-happy son. Then, Sonia and Froy crash a pool party where the guests were happy to give up their clothes, but they're not willing to give up their car. Finally, Matt and Lou encounter a hearse that they've been tracking for weeks, but before they're able to hook it up, they've got to figure out what's in the back

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers who will stop at nothing to protect their massive tractor-trailer. Next, a young girl learns that she's been a victim of a pyramid scam when Lyndah and Lou come for her car. Finally, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah enjoy a little nightlife when they hit the club to take down an entitled princess who's high on charm, but late on her payments. But the debtor's not the only one who fights to get the car.

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Going Green and Falling Down
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: Oscar Nominated "Ninety-five Senses"

programme.title: The Wolfpack
programme.desc: THE WOLFPACK is a coming of age story following the six Angulo brothers who have spent their entire lives locked away from society in an apartment on the Lower East Side of Manhattan. All they know of the outside world is gleaned from the films they watch obsessively and recreate meticulously, using elaborate homemade props and costumes. For years this has served as a productive way to stave off loneliness – but when one of the brothers escapes, everything changes. Directed by Crystal Moselle.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: The Adventure of America's Horses

Today, these untamed horses are fighting for their freedom and even their very survival in the wide open spaces of the American West. But who is aware that these present-day Mustangs are first and foremost the guardians of an unheralded heritage? That of the horses of the New World. This is an epic story, nearly 500 years old, and we have chosen to tell it through an exceptional journey, akin to that taken by the horses themselves.

programme.title: Zen Evenings

programme.title: Zen Evenings

programme.title: Shades of Red
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades of Red (S1E3) — Explore a vibrant, passionate art collection where the color red takes center stage.
